title: alyssum litorale
intro: Alyssum litorale, also known as sea lavender, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of sea lavender include its ability to soothe anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herb in aromatherapy and herbal medicine. Alyssum litorale can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
